description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a sleek, boxy silhouette and a deep black finish. The sofa features two large, square backrest cushions and two matching seat cushions, all of which appear to be well-padded and slightly indented for comfort. The armrests are wide, straight, and extend from the base to just below the top of the backrest, giving the sofa a robust and contemporary look. The upholstery has a subtle, fine-textured pattern, likely a woven fabric or synthetic leather, with a slight sheen. The base of the sofa is supported by four short, block-style wooden legs, which are only partially visible. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern black two-seater sofa with wide armrests, square cushions, and subtle textured upholstery, supported by short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large backrest cushions, two seat cushions, and wide, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's deep seat, thick armrest, and the slight backward angle of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a continuous, flat back panel with the tops of the backrest cushions visible above the frame.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the profile of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, square seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size and attached, with a slight indentation in the center.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight armrests at seat height, with a boxy profile and no visible decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs placed at the corners, made of wood with a dark brown finish, partially recessed under the base.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest with two large, attached cushions, continuous in height and width, no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a subtle, fine-textured woven or synthetic pattern, no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
